title: Restore Posekit marker editing, zoom/lens controls, and failure containment
operator_request: Posekit needs marker toggles and placement adjustment, initially facial markers, zoom/lens/black-space export forcing, and safe add/remove body marker behavior.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Start with facial marker editing parity and explicit failure containment for bad/missing limb markers.

scope.summary: Add Posekit editing tools for markers, framing/zoom, and safe marker add/remove behavior without breaking OpenPose exports.
base_scope: Toggle marker visibility and marker classes.
Adjust marker placement, with facial marker support first.
Add zoom/lens/black-space export controls to force model framing such as full-body-with-feet.
Gate add-hand/add-marker features behind validation so bad detections do not corrupt export renders.
Update internal UserManual with Posekit editing and failure recovery.
acceptance_criteria: Posekit marker controls are visible, stable, and Argus-steerable.
Facial marker placement edits persist into export state.
Zoom/lens controls affect output framing metadata or pixels.
Bad marker injection fails closed without corrupting the OpenPose output.
verification: Pose marker data tests for edit/remove/fail-closed behavior.
Native UI tests for marker controls.
